items.headline: Game Recap: Cavaliers 125, Raptors 120
items.description: The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors, 125-120, in Game 5 of the series. Evan Mobley led Cleveland with 23 points and nine rebounds, while James Harden added 23 points, nine rebounds, and five assists. RJ Barrett led Toronto with 25 points and a playoff career-high 12 rebounds. Cleveland now leads the series 3-2, with Game 6 taking place on Friday, May 1.
